basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Medical): MBBS/BVSc/BDS or equivalent

selection_process: Interview will be done in offline/online mode. The details of interview will be sent only to shortlisted candidates through email.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) position is 01-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/BVSc/BDS or an equivalent degree to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67000/- plus HRA, as admissible.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online by filling out the Google form provided by AIIMS Delhi before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 12/22/B&PS/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
